content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, the nitrogen atom (index 14) is covalently connected to the following neighbor atoms:

*   Atom index 13 (Element: C)
*   Atom index 15 (Element: C)
*   Atom index 33 (Element: C)

The `geomconf_index` for this molecule is 4409.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 14 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
